name: George Colligan
abstract: George Colligan (born December 29, 1969) is an American jazz pianist, organist, drummer, trumpeter, educator, composer, and bandleader.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Cassandra Wilson/ Cesaria Evora
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
